title: exhalimolobos hispidulus
side_effects: Exhalimolobos hispidulus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing respiratory issues, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Prolonged use can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while some individuals may experience skin irritation, rashes, or itching. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can cause anaphylaxis, a potentially life-threatening allergic reaction. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Exhalimolobos hispidulus to avoid these adverse effects.
